flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Enterprise State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Enterprise State Community College rose 87% between 2007 and 2010 (17.3% → 32.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Enterprise State Community College rose 31% between 2009 and 2010 (23.0% → 30.2%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Enterprise State Community College are 25% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($42.6k vs $34.0k).
